_comment: Machine-readable architectural contract for Agnostic Seed. Read before any code change.

distribution_model.rule: Each project is a separate fork. The running app has one project storage root.

architecture.paradigm: Schema-driven agnostic UI for one fork-owned project
persistence_flow: 1. Component calls saveItem(context, item) or POST /api/vault
3. getStrategy() selects persistence from environment variables

strategy_layer.rule: Only /api/vault and server-side tools mutate storage through the adapter.

agent_harness.rule: Load fork context deliberately. Do not read historical plans or research archives by default.

schema_compiler.rule: Never edit generated schema types manually.

fork_update_contract.preferred: git fetch upstream && git merge upstream/main
fork_update_contract.avoid: copying whole engine folders into forks outside git history

legacy_terms.silo: obsolete runtime concept; use storage root
legacy_terms.ACTIVE_TENANT: obsolete; strategy is selected by deployment env vars

critical_restrictions: Never reintroduce storage/{tenant}/db as the default local layout.
Never use schemas.json as the schema source of truth.
Never write business logic into packages/ for a project fork.
Never bypass /api/vault or the adapter for storage mutations.
Never generate IDs with Math.random() or Date.now().
Never add camelCase aliases beside snake_case storage keys.
